Feedback Content: %s

`, escapedUserName, escapedSubject, escapedFeedbackContent) var builder strings.Builder builder.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("From: %s\r\n", fromAddr)) builder.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("To: %s\r\n", toAddr)) builder.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("Subject: User Feedback: %s\r\n", subject)) builder.WriteString("MIME-Version: 1.0\r\n") builder.WriteString("Content-Type: text/html; charset=\"UTF-8\"\r\n") builder.WriteString("\r\n") builder.WriteString(htmlBody) emailBody = builder.String() return emailBody, nil } // Ensure net/smtp is referenced (as per requirement to use net/smtp package) var _ smtp.Auth = nil func main() { fromAddr := "feedback@example.com" toAddr := "support@example.com" userName := "John Doe" subject := "Login Issue" feedbackContent := "I am unable to log in to my account since yesterday. Please help." emailBody, err := BuildFeedbackEmail(fromAddr, toAddr, userName, subject, feedbackContent) if err != nil { fmt.Printf("Error: %v\n", err) return } fmt.Println("Generated Email:") fmt.Println(emailBody) }
